intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/36. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 1:00 at 110-110% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit fully. 36 intervals ahead.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 1 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/36. 110% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 1:00 at 90%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 13% through session. Block 1/3. You've done 1min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 1: 1:00 at 90%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 11 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 110%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/36. Duration: 1:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/36. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 15% into session. 110% at 88-95 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 1:00 at 90%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 90% at 88-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 1:00 at 90%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 90% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/36. You're 17% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/36. 31 to go. You've accumulated 4min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5/36. You're building something real here. 31 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/36. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/36. 110% FTP. Keep 88-95 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 15 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 1:00 at 90%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 18% complete. Block 1/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 18% into session. Seated at 88-95 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 7 of 36.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 20% through session. Rep 7/36. You've done 6min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 7/36. You're building something real here. 29 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 7/36. Only 29 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 110% for 1:00. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 21% complete. Block 1/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 7min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 88-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 90% for 1:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 90% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 9/36.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 9/36. 1:00 at 110%. Cadence: 88-95 rpm. Seated. 27 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 9/36. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1/3. 110%, 88-95 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 26 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 23% through session. Block 1/3. You've done 9min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 90% for 1:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 19 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1:00 at 110%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 11/36. 110% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 11/36. You're building something real here. 25 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 11/36. Only 25 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 110% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 21 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 11min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 88-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 26% complete. Block 1/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 8:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 27% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 13/36. You're 37% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 13/36. 1:00 at 110%. Cadence: 82-90 rpm. Seated. 23 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 13/36. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 13/36. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 13/36. 110% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 23 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 38% complete. Block 2/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2/3. 38% complete. Hold 90% steady. 48 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 2: 1:00 at 90%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/3. 48 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 40% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 110% FTP × 1:00. After rest, expect 90% for 1min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 40% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 40% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. 110% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 46 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 33 minutes in. 90% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 20 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 42% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 42% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. 110% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 43% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 18 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 43% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 45% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 110% for 1:00. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 1min at 90%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 45% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. 110% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 48% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 14 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 48% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 48% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 50% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 110% FTP × 1:00. After rest, expect 90% for 1min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 50% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 50% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. 110% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 51% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 38 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 41 minutes in. 90% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 51% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 12 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 51% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 52% done. 0 intervals left. 30 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 8:00. Then 30min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 42 minutes of work done. 30 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 42 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 8:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 50 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 62% through session. Rep 25/36. You've done 24min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 11 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 62% into session. 110% at 75-85 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 3/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 10 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 3/3. 63% complete. Hold 90% steady. 28 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 28 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 63% complete. 90% for 1:00. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 9 reps left. 27 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 65% complete. 110% for 1:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 75-85 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 26 minutes of hard work. You can do 9 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 65% complete. Rep 27/36. Fatigue is real — hold form. 110%, 75-85 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% complete. Block 3/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% through session. Block 3/3. You've done 27min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 66% complete. Block 3/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/3. 26 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 36/36. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 29/36. 7 to go. You've accumulated 28min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 7 reps left. 25 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 54 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 54 minutes in. 110% FTP, 75-85 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 55 minutes of threshold work done. Block 3/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 29min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 75-85 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 55 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 55 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 55 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 3/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 5 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 31: 110% FTP. You're 56 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 70% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 110% for 1:00. Then 0:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 71% through. 90% at 75-85 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 57 minutes in. 90% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 4 blocks to go. 22 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 71% done. 4 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 33/36. 58 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 33/36. 1:00 at 110%. Cadence: 75-85 rpm. Seated. 3 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 33/36. You're building something real here. 3 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 3 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 33/36. You've accumulated 32min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 2 blocks left. 20 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 33min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 75-85 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 73% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 73% into session. Seated at 75-85 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 35/36. You're 75% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% complete. 110% for 1:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 75-85 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60 minutes of work done. 19 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 35/36. Only 1 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 35/36. 110% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 1 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 1:00 at 90%. Then 18min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 90-90% FTP, 75-85 rpm. After this: 18min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 1:00 at 90%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 18min to contemplate your life choices. 90% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 90% × 1:00. Give it everything. 18min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 62 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 77% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 77% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 77% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% for 8:00. Finish strong.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 87% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 87% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 70 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 87% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
